Title: Access landing page at root URL
Preconditions: Server is running on configured PORT
Steps: 1. Open browser | 2. Navigate to http://localhost:9001/ | 3. Verify response
Expected Result: Landing page JSON response is returned with status 200, containing welcome message, version, endpoints object with landing/auth/health links, and callToAction object with "Start Your Loan Application" text

Title: Access full landing page content via API
Preconditions: Server is running and /api/landing route is accessible
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/landing | 2. Verify response structure | 3. Check all sections are present
Expected Result: Response status 200 with complete landing page JSON including: title (Oktawave Loan Origination System), branding colors (primary #003366, secondary #0066CC, accent #FF6600), sections array with hero/features/process/cta types, footer with company name and copyright, meta with timestamp

Title: Complete user journey from landing to loan application
Steps: 1. Access root URL / | 2. Get callToAction.link value | 3. Navigate to /api/landing | 4. Retrieve hero section callToAction.link | 5. Verify it points to /api/loan/apply
Expected Result: User can navigate from root → /api/landing endpoint, landing page hero section contains callToAction with link "/api/loan/apply" and text "Start Your Application", footer contains Learn More button linking to "/api/loan/info"

Title: Verify all Oktawave branding elements are present
Steps: 1. GET /api/landing | 2. Extract branding object | 3. Verify colors object contains primary/secondary/accent/background/text | 4. Verify typography contains primaryFont and headingFont
Expected Result: Branding object exists with colors: {primary: "#003366", secondary: "#0066CC", accent: "#FF6600", background: "#F5F5F5", text: "#333333"} and typography: {primaryFont: "Open Sans, sans-serif", headingFont: "Roboto, sans-serif"}

Title: Retrieve specific landing page sections
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/landing/content/branding | 2. Verify branding details returned
Expected Result: Status 200, JSON response contains colors object, typography object, and logo object with primary/white/icon paths

Title: Access testimonials section
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/landing/content/testimonials | 2. Verify testimonials array
Expected Result: Status 200, array of testimonials with id, name, role, rating (5), and text fields for at least 2 testimonials

Title: Access FAQ section
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/landing/content/faq | 2. Verify FAQ array structure
Expected Result: Status 200, array of FAQ objects each containing question and answer fields, including questions about approval time, required documents, and interest rates

Title: Request non-existent content section
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/landing/content/invalid_section | 2. Check error response
Expected Result: Status 404, JSON response with message: "Section not found"

Title: Access landing page with trailing slash
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/landing/ | 2. Verify response
Expected Result: Status 200, same complete landing page JSON response as without trailing slash

Title: Access undefined route under landing
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/landing/undefined/path | 2. Check error handling
Expected Result: Status 404, appropriate error message indicating route not found (handled by server's global 404 handler)

Title: Send POST request to GET-only landing endpoint
Steps: 1. Send POST request to /api/landing | 2. Verify method not allowed response
Expected Result: Status 404 or 405, error response indicating method not allowed or route not found for POST method

Title: Verify footer copyright year is dynamic
Steps: 1. GET /api/landing | 2. Extract footer.copyright | 3. Verify year matches current year
Expected Result: Footer copyright contains current year (2026) in format "© 2026 Oktawave. All rights reserved."

Title: Verify hero section call-to-action button styling
Steps: 1. GET /api/landing | 2. Navigate to sections array | 3. Find section with type='hero' | 4. Extract callToAction.buttonStyle
Expected Result: Hero section callToAction object contains buttonStyle field with value "primary"

Title: Verify all process steps are in correct order
Steps: 1. GET /api/landing | 2. Find section with type='process' | 3. Extract steps array | 4. Verify step numbers 1-4 in sequence
Expected Result: Process section contains 4 steps in order: 1-Create Account, 2-Complete Application, 3-Get Approved, 4-Receive Funds, each with title and description

Title: Verify health check still works after landing page addition
Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/health | 2. Verify response
Expected Result: Status 200, JSON response with status: "ok" and timestamp in ISO format, confirming existing routes are not broken
